name: achaean-fleet-pipeline
description: Dagger CI/CD pipeline for AchaeanFleet container images
//overrides: Force-bump transitive deps in @dagger.io/dagger to patched versions. @opentelemetry/exporter-prometheus<0.217.0 (GHSA-q7rr-3cgh-j5r3) and protobufjs<=7.5.5 (GHSA-66ff-xgx4-vchm et al.) are pulled in via @dagger.io/dagger's @opentelemetry/sdk-node dep. adm-zip<0.6.0 (CVE-2026-39244 / GHSA-xcpc-8h2w-3j85, HIGH) is pulled directly by @dagger.io/dagger, which still pins ^0.5.17. No non-breaking dagger SDK release fixes these (upstream advisory recommends @dagger.io/dagger@0.11.2 downgrade). Overrides verified to still allow @dagger.io/dagger to import cleanly.
